name: tibco-vectordb-azureaisearch-rag-query
title: RAG Query
description: Full RAG pipeline: embed query text → vector search → format context for LLM. Combines embedding generation and semantic retrieval in one activity.

display.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: embed → search → format context

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the Azure AI Search VectorDB connector to use for retrieval

display.name: Use Connector Embedding Settings
display.description: Inherit the embedding provider, API key, and base URL from the VectorDB connection.

display.name: Embedding Provider
display.description: API provider used to embed the query text.

display.name: Embedding API Key
display.description: API key for the embedding provider.

display.name: Embedding Base URL
display.description: Override the default provider URL.

display.name: Embedding Model
display.description: Embedding model used to encode the query. Must match the model used during document ingestion.

display.name: Embedding Dimensions
display.description: Output dimensions (0 = model default). Must match the collection's vector dimension.

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Fallback collection name when not provided in the activity input

display.name: Default Top-K
display.description: Default number of documents to retrieve

display.name: Score Threshold
display.description: Minimum similarity score (0.0 = no filter).

display.name: Content Field
display.description: Payload field name containing the document text.

display.name: Context Format
display.description: Format of formattedContext output.

display.name: Timeout (s)
display.description: Total timeout covering embedding API + vector search

display.name: Use Hybrid Search
display.description: Enable hybrid (BM25 + dense vector) search for improved recall.

display.name: Hybrid Alpha
display.description: Blend weight: 0.0 = pure BM25, 1.0 = pure dense vector, 0.5 = balanced.

display.name: Enable LLM Generation
display.description: When enabled, the retrieved context is passed to an LLM to generate an answer.

display.name: LLM Provider
display.description: LLM provider for answer generation.

display.name: LLM Base URL
display.description: Base URL for the LLM API.

display.name: LLM API Key
display.description: API key for OpenAI or Azure OpenAI.

display.name: LLM Model
display.description: Model name for generation.

settings.name: systemPrompt
settings.value: You are a helpful assistant. Answer the question using only the provided context. If the context does not contain enough information, say so.

display.name: System Prompt
display.description: Default system/instruction prompt.

display.name: Max Tokens
display.description: Maximum tokens in the generated answer.

display.name: Temperature
display.description: Sampling temperature (0.0 = deterministic).
